canonicalRule: promptText is the canonical question text

questions.promptText: The mass media, such as TV, radio and newspapers, have an influence on people, particularly on younger generations. It plays a pivotal role in shaping the opinions of people, especially teenagers and young people. To what extent do you agree with this? Please give examples.
Some believe the value of travel is highly overrated. "One brilliant scholar never leaves the home bases." To what extent do you agree that travel is not a necessary component of a quality education?

Nowadays, it is increasingly more difficult to maintain the right balance between work and the other aspects of one's life, such as leisure pursuits with family members. How important do you think this balance is? What are the reasons that make some people think that this is hard to achieve?
Do you think the design of buildings affects, positively or negatively, where people live and work?
Medical technology is responsible for increasing the average life expectancy. Do you think it is a curse or a blessing?

Age restrictions are placed on many activities. It is believed that people should not do things until they reach the right ages, such as getting married, driving, voting, buying certain products, and doing particular things. Give an example, state which minimum age you think it should be and share your own experience.
Should marketing in companies which produce consumer goods, like food and clothing, place emphasis on the reputation of the company or short-term strategies like discounts and special offers? Why?

With the increase of digital media available online, the role of the library has become obsolete. Universities should only provide new digital media rather than constantly update textbooks. Discuss both the advantages and disadvantages of this position and give your own point of view.
Experience is the best teacher. Some people believe it is more effective than formal school study and books, what do you think?
In our technological world, the number of new inventions has been evolving daily. Please describe a new invention and determine whether it has a beneficial or detrimental impact on society.
Should parents be held legally responsible for the actions of their children? Support your opinion from your study, observation or experiences.

Effective study requires time, comfort and peace. It is impossible to combine a student's learning with employment because one may distract the other. To what extent do you think the statements are realistic? Give your opinion with examples.

Many education systems assess students' learning using formal written examinations. Those kinds of exams are a valid method. To what extent do you agree or disagree? Give examples from your own experience.
In many towns and cities large shopping malls are replacing small local shops. Do you think this is a positive development? Give your reasons and examples.
Climate change is a concerning global issue. Who has the main responsibility to take action to solve this problem, governments, large companies, or individuals?

Television serves many useful functions. It helps people to relax. We can learn from television, and it can also be seen as a companion for the lonely. To what extent do you agree with this? Explain why with your own experience.

Unemployment among young people is a serious problem. One suggested solution is to shorten the working week. What do you think are the advantages and disadvantages? Do you think this policy should apply to just young workers or the whole workforce?
While artificial intelligence becomes so advanced, people can use computers to translate foreign languages that makes learning a foreign language unnecessary. To what extent do you agree with it?
"In the future, people will work fewer hours at their jobs than they do now." Do you agree with the statement? Please support your opinion with your own experience.

The information revolution brought about by modern mass communications has both positive and negative consequences for individuals and society. To what extent do you agree with this statement? Give the reason with your own experience.
Some people think human behavior can be changed by laws, while others think laws have little effect. What is your opinion?

Many countries spend large amounts of money on the restoration of historic buildings rather than on modern housing. To what extent do you agree or disagree with this analysis? What are the advantages and disadvantages of this? Support your writing with your experience or examples.
It is harder for children to grow up in the 21st century than it was in the past. How far do you agree with this statement? Give your opinions.
Imagine you have been assigned one area in the study of climate change. Which area will you focus on and why? Use examples.
In some companies, employers involve workers in the decision-making process about products and services. What are the advantages and disadvantages of such a policy?
Nowadays, people who devote too much time to their job leave very little time for their personal and private life. How widespread is the problem? What problem will this shortage of time cause?

Some people point that experiential learning (i.e. learning by doing it) can work well in formal education. However, others think a traditional form of teaching is the best. Do you think experiential learning can work well in high schools or colleges?
Some people think learning a foreign language at school should be compulsory. To what extent do you agree with it? Use your experience or examples to support your viewpoint.
Some people prefer to live in cities, while some people prefer to live in the countryside. Which is better for you? Give your reasons or experience.

What are the problems and the benefits for high school students of studying plays and other works for theatre that were written centuries ago? Do you agree with it? Use your own experience to discuss it.
Some universities deduct marks from students' work if it is given in late. What is your opinion? Suggest some alternative actions.

The world's governments and international organizations confront a multitude of global problems. Which do you think is the most pressing problem for the inhabitants of our planet and give the solution?

As cities expand, governments should look forward to creating better networks of public transport available for everyone rather than building more roads for vehicle owning population. To what extent do you agree or disagree?
Some people say there should be a maximum wage for high-paying jobs. Do you support that? Can you give your point of view or your own experience?

People who are famous entertainers or sportspeople should give up the right to privacy as this is the price of fame. To what extent do you agree/disagree with this point of view? Give your opinion with your own experience.
Tourism is good for a less developed country, but disadvantages of tourism can be as great as advantages. Please discuss it.

variants.promptText: Tourism is good for a less developed country, but disadvantages of tourism can be as great as advantages. Please discuss it.
For a less developed country, the disadvantages of tourism are as great as the advantages. Discuss this statement, and explain your opinion.

questions.promptText: Some people say the elderly are unsuitable to take part in some activities. Please give an example of the activities, and give the maximum age for it.
Some think a city should try to preserve its old, historic buildings. Others think a city should destroy them and replace them with modern buildings. What is your opinion?
What is the role of writing theater plays and discussing historical writings in the study of high school students?
